creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to update games/xskewb port.


diff -Nru xskewb/Makefile xskewb-5.4.4/Makefile
--- xskewb/Makefile	Thu Apr  2 04:04:41 1998
+++ xskewb-5.4.4/Makefile	Fri May  8 12:20:38 1998
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	xskewb
-# Version required:			5.4.3
+# Version required:			5.4.4
 # Date created:				25 March 1998
 # Whom:					Andrey Zakhvatov
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.2 1998/04/02 04:04:41 hoek Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=		xskewb-5.4.3
+DISTNAME=		xskewb-5.4.4
 CATEGORIES=		games x11
 MASTER_SITES=		${MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	games/xpuzzles
diff -Nru xskewb/files/md5 xskewb-5.4.4/files/md5
--- xskewb/files/md5	Thu Apr  2 03:56:43 1998
+++ xskewb-5.4.4/files/md5	Fri May  8 12:20:44 1998
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (xskewb-5.4.3.tar.gz) = af11b5ebc2e2ee5ba47acce31eb6e88b
+MD5 (xskewb-5.4.4.tar.gz) = aa7effc670bf1031394fbaa6368465a4
diff -Nru xskewb/pkg/COMMENT xskewb-5.4.4/pkg/COMMENT
--- xskewb/pkg/COMMENT	Thu Apr  2 03:56:43 1998
+++ xskewb-5.4.4/pkg/COMMENT	Fri May  8 12:21:56 1998
@@ -1 +1 @@
-Skewb puzzle (similar to Rubik's Cube) for XWindows.
+Skewb puzzle (similar to Rubik's Cube) for X Window.

Fix: 

Please, check and apply this patch.
